scripts.dev:remote: [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; (test -n "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" || (echo '请先设置 CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN' && exit 1)) && concurrently "vite --mode remote" "wrangler dev --local --port 8888 --ip 0.0.0.0 --var USE_REMOTE_D1_HTTP:true --var CF_ACCOUNT_ID:5231e27427d1d2a36acf213a56d09110 --var CF_D1_DATABASE_ID:f0a155e4-8094-43a6-9745-58f159ef2d14 --var \"CF_API_TOKEN:$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN\""
